reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
런치박스가 초급 스카우트가 중급이란 후기보고
차례로 구입하고 싶었는데 런치가 품절에 걸려있어서
먼저 구입했어요 노즈워크가 처음이라 좀 헤멜줄 알았는데 한번 도와주고 나서 이후엔 혼자 2-30분정도 
잘 가지고 놀아서 저희 밥먹을때 주니 엄청 편하게 좋네요
다른 장난감처럼 늘상 가지고 놀지 못하게
할때만 딱 꺼내주니 더 집중하는거 같아요
다른 버전도 구입할 예정입니다~^^
reviews.content_en: After hearing reviews that the Lunch Box is beginner level and Scout is intermediate, I wanted to buy them in order, but the Lunch was out of stock so I got this first. Since it was my first time with a nose work toy, I thought my pup would be confused, but after showing her once, she's been playing with it on her own for 20-30 minutes! It's super helpful to give it to her while we eat. Since I only take it out at specific times unlike other toys, she seems even more focused. I'm planning to get other versions too~^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
엄청 잘 갖고 놀아요~🐶
보관하기도 용이하고 좋습니다!
reviews.content_en: She plays with it so much!🐶 It's easy to store and great!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
일단 바잇미는 배송도 칼배송이고,
예외는 있겠지만 대부분 뭘 사든 5,000원 이상 무료 배송에
할인 이벤트도 많이 해서 어차피 살거면 바잇미에서 ! 라는 마음을 갖게 하는 것 같아요 !
그리고 일단 색감이나 디자인 너무 귀엽게 잘 뽑아내서 맘에 들어요 !! 옷들도 대형견용도 늘 만들어 준다면,, 우리 대형견 보호자들 아마 다 살겨 !!
이건 블프 전에 그냥 산건데,, 런치 박스는 품절이여서 이거만 사봤는데 만족 만족 대만족,, 이거 안 사는 사람 왜 안 삼 ? 다양한 노즈워크 장난감들을 미니 형태로 여러개 줄여놓은 종합 노즈워크 장난감이랄까나,,
스스로 찍찍이 떼고 막 지도 펼치고 주머니 뒤져서 먹느라고 바쁘고,, 처음엔 버벅 거려도 노즈워크 천재라,, 두 세번 하더니 마스터 해버렸지만 그래도 잠깐이나마 저에게 자유시간을 주는 장난감,,
런치 박스는 뭔가 더 쉬워 보였는데 스카우트 플레이북에 많이 만족해서 아묻따 사야지 ~~ ㅎㅎ
그니까 다들 얼른 주문해여 ! 노즈워크 천재를 반려하는 보호자로써 이거 추천 입니다 넘 아이디어 좋댜 좋아
reviews.content_en: First of all, BITE ME has super fast shipping, and while there are exceptions, most items get free shipping over 5,000 won with lots of discount events, so it makes you feel like "if I'm going to buy something anyway, it's from BITE ME!" Plus the colors and designs are so cute, I love it!! If you keep making clothes for large breed dogs, I bet all us large breed parents will buy them!! I just bought this before the Black Friday sale, and the Lunch Box was out of stock so I only tried this, but satisfaction beyond satisfaction... why wouldn't anyone buy this? It's like a comprehensive nose work toy with mini versions of various nose work toys all in one... My pup is busy ripping off velcro, unfolding maps, and digging through pockets, and even though she fumbled at first, she's a nose work genius - after just a couple tries she's mastered it. But it still gives me a few moments of peace, this toy... The Lunch Box looked a bit easier, but I'm so satisfied with the Scout Playbook that I'm definitely getting the rest~~ hehe So everyone order quick! As a guardian of a nose work genius, I totally recommend this. Such a good idea!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
기존 런치박스 노즈워크북을 너무 좋아해서 
새로운 버전이 나왔길래 아묻따! 구매했습니다.
런치박스가 초급이라면 스카우트는 중급? 정도?? 
저희 강아지는 심각한 노즈워크 중독자라서
여행,캠핑 시 노즈워크 인형을 몇개 챙겨서 다니곤하는데
요즘은 이 노즈워크북 하나만 챙겨서 다닙니다. 진짜 알차요
계속 시리즈물이 나왔으면 좋겠어요. 전집 구매 각 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My dog loved the original Lunch Box Nose Work Book so much, so when a new version came out, I bought it without hesitation! If Lunch Box is beginner level, then Scout is intermediate level maybe?? My pup is seriously a nose work addict - when we travel or go camping, I usually bring a few nose work toys, but these days I just bring this one nose work book. It's really packed with value. I hope they keep making more series. Thinking about buying the whole set haha

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
우리집 대왕 바보개를 위해 준비했어요
18키로 진도믹스 중형견이고, 책이 작아서 놀랬지만
실제로 아기가 쓰는 걸 보니 그렇게 작다는 생각이 안 들어요!
무엇보다 며칠 쓰고 조져질까 걱정했는데 생각보다 엄청 튼튼하네요!!
머리대신 힘으로 해결하는 타입이라고 생각했는데 .. 울 애기 머리 쓰나봐요 ㅠ ㅠ
요즘 울 애기 취미가 독서네요.. 울 집에서 책 젤 많이 읽음 …
암튼 던져주면 15분은 조용~히 집중하네요!! 즐거워보이고
책만 들어도 벌써 신나해요 ㅠ ㅜ 그래서 다른 디자인으로 바로 주문했어요 ㅎㅅㅎ
강쥐가 붙잡고 엎드려 노는 모습이 찐입니다…
좀 더 큰 버전으로 더 내주세요 제발 ~~!
reviews.content_en: I got this for my big silly pup at home. She's an 18kg Jindo mix (medium-large), and I was surprised the book was so small, but when I see my baby using it, it doesn't seem small at all! Most importantly, I was worried it would fall apart after a few days of use, but it's surprisingly super durable!! I thought she was the type to solve things with brute force rather than brains... but our girl must be using her head ㅠㅠ Lately her hobby is reading.. she reads the most books in our house... Anyway, when I throw it to her, she's quiet and focused for 15 minutes!! She looks so happy, and she gets excited just seeing the book, so I ordered another design right away ㅎㅅㅎ The way she grabs onto it and lies down playing is so real... Please make a bigger version!!

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content:
받자마자 까까들 채워주고 출근했어요
너무너무 좋아하네요
발로 누르고 여는 재미, 간식 찾는 재미도 있어서 더 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I filled it with treats as soon as I got it and went to work. She loves it so much! The fun of pressing with her paws and opening it, plus the joy of finding treats - it's even better!

reviews.name: ㅊ****
reviews.content: 품절 풀린거 확인하자마자 잽싸게 구매했어요!!! 표지도 넘 귀욥귀욤하고 내용도 알차서 만족도 500%입니다💓💓다만 세트상품은 기다려도 재고 없다고 나와서ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ한번에 구매 못한게 조금 아쉽네여😂😂아직 어려서 그런지 난이도 높은 노즈워크는 잘 못하구 가방 앞 포켓이랑 지도 위주로 성공하고 있어요! 이 제품의 가장 좋은점이 난이도 조절이 가능하구 활용도가 높다는 점 같아요ㅎㅎ새로운 시리즈도 기대할게요
reviews.content_en: I bought it as soon as I confirmed the stock was back!! The cover is so adorable and the contents are packed with value - I'm 500% satisfied 💓💓 The only thing is the set product still shows no stock even if I wait ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ so I'm a bit disappointed I couldn't buy everything at once 😂😂 Since she's still young, she's not great at the harder nose work puzzles yet and is mostly succeeding with the front pocket of the bag and the map section! I think the best part of this product is that you can adjust the difficulty level and it has high versatility hehe I'm looking forward to the new series!

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content:
환장해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
애기때부터 노즈워크를 열심히 시켜서 어색해 하거나 흥미가 없거나 하는거 없이 난리난리 입니다 
자주 하던게 오래되기도 하고 이제 새로운게 필요할것 같아 눈여겨보고 있다가 좀 저렴할때 구매했어요 
저는 저희집 엘리가 노즈워크를 엄청 잘하는 애라고 생각해서 3레벨 주문한건데 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 너무 과대 평가했나봐요 아직 처음이라 그런거겠죠 ㅋㅋ  책장 여는것 부터 난관에 부딪혔어요 그래서 사료로 유인하고 그사이에 중간에 책장 열어주고 중간에 돌돌만거 풀어줬네요 ㅋㅋ 30분째 킁킁대며 씨름하고 있어요 
노즈워크 좋아하는 애들  .... 사료 잘먹고 아무튼 먹는거 좋아하는 애들 ㅋㅋ완전 강추합니다 !!!!
reviews.content_en: I'm obsessed haha From puppyhood I've been doing nose work training with her so she doesn't hesitate or lack interest - she goes crazy! The ones I used frequently wore out and I felt like she needed something new, so I was keeping an eye out and bought it when it was a bit cheaper. I ordered level 3 thinking my Ella is really good at nose work but haha I think I overestimated her. Maybe it's because she's just starting. From opening the book cover, she hit a wall! So I lured her with kibble and opened the cover for her in between, and loosened the rolled parts... 30 minutes in and she's still sniffing and wrestling with it hehe For pups who love nose work... who eat well and love food in general hehe Totally recommend it!!!

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 정말좋아해여 진작사줄껄..
reviews.content_en: I really love it, wish I had bought it sooner..

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 런치박스도 최애였고 새로 나와서 사주니 너무 좋아해서 표지 강아지 첫날부터 뜯어먹어서 바느질 해줬어요 간식을 넣어주지 않아도 잘 갖고 놉니다 잔뜩 기대하는 초롱초롱한 눈빛
reviews.content_en: The Lunch Box was also my favorite, and when I got her the new one, she loved it so much she started chewing on the dog on the cover from day one, so I had to sew it up! Even without putting treats in it, she plays with it well. Those sparkling eyes full of anticipation

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 강아지 최애 장난감입니다 노즈워크임에도 간식이 없어도 스스로 갖고 놀 정도로 최애 장난감입니다 겉표지 강아지도 뾱뾱 소리 나고 페이지를 넘기는 재미가 있나봐요
reviews.content_en: It's my dog's favorite toy! Even though it's a nose work toy, my pup plays with it on their own without treats—it's definitely their go-to favorite. The cover has a squeaky sound and my dog loves flipping through the pages 😊

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이거 너무너무 물건인듯...
강아지가 심심해 해서 늘 이런저런 노으워크 장난감을 가지고 놀게 하는데 이건 정말 총집합된 노즈워크 장난감인듯...
완전추천이요~~♡,.♡
처음엔 조금 어려운지 책장을 펴지못하고 빨리 먹을생각에
책장 사이로만 킁킁거리며 노력해서 두어번 머는법 설명해주고보여주었더니 이젠 거실에서방으요 방에서 책상믿으로
물고다니며 먹으려고 노력하네요~~^^
단계가 그리 쉽지 않아 오래 놀아서 너무너무 좋아요~♡^^♡
reviews.content_en: This is seriously such a great product... My dog gets bored easily, so I'm always giving them different nose work toys to play with, but this one is like the ultimate collection of nose work toys... Highly recommend!! ♡,.♡ At first they had a little trouble opening the pages and just wanted to eat quickly, so they were just sniffing between the pages. After showing them how to do it a couple times, now they're carrying it around the living room, then the bedroom, then under the desk trying to eat from it~~ ^^ The difficulty levels aren't too easy so my pup plays with it for a long time, which is amazing! ~♡^^♡

reviews.name: 염****
reviews.content: 런치박스도 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 스카우트도 잘 놀걸 같아서 샀는데 역시 셋 다 잘 놀아요
reviews.content_en: My dog plays so well with the lunch box version, so I thought Scout would like it too and bought it. Sure enough, all three versions are huge hits!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 리뷰 작성하려고 사진 찍는데 자기꺼라고 가져가려는 우리집 댕댕이ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 사진 찍고 바로 줬는데 이걸 왜 이제서야 사줬나 싶을정도로 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I was taking photos to write a review and my pup kept trying to take it back like it was theirs ㅋㅋㅋㅋ I took the photo and gave it to them right away, and honestly I'm kicking myself for not getting this sooner—my dog loves it so much!

reviews.name: w****
reviews.content: 저희집 댕댕이가 첫번째 버전도 너무 잘 갖고 놀아서 나오자 마자 주문했어용!! 역시나 마찬가지로 너무 잘 갖고 놀아용 ㅎㅎ 푸들도 너무 귀엽고 또 새로운 버전 나오면 살거예용 ㅜㅠ
reviews.content_en: Our pup absolutely loved the first version, so we ordered this new one as soon as it came out! ♡ And of course they love this one just as much! ㅎㅎ The poodle is so cute too, and if a new version comes out, we're definitely getting it! ㅜㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 플레이북은 출시되면 다 사고 있어요!
다른 노즈워크에 비해서 정리하기도 보관하기도 쉬워서요(사람입장에서 ㅋㅋ)
스카우트 노즈워크는 전편에 비해 확실히 난이도가 올라가고 강아지가 더 재밌어하는거 같아요
특히 텐트와 가방 꺼내먹는걸 좋아해요!!!!
reviews.content_en: I buy every Nose Work Playbook that comes out! It's so much easier to organize and store compared to other nose work toys (from a human perspective lol). Scout Nose Work definitely has a higher difficulty level than the previous version, and my dog seems to enjoy it even more. I especially love how they go after the tent and bag pockets!!!!!

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 장난감 알아보던 중에 너무 귀여운 플레이북이 나와서 고민하다가 구매했어요! 플레이북 오자마자 간식 넣어서 줬는데 고개를 들지 않아욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ계속 집중ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 발로 막 뜯을 기세여서 잠시 멈추고 다시 하게 해줬어욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: While I was looking for nose work toys, this adorable playbook came out and I was torn but decided to buy it! As soon as the playbook arrived, I put treats in it and gave it to my dog, and they didn't lift their head ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ just kept focusing ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ They were about to rip it apart with their paws so I paused them and let them try again ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 세트상품으로 구매했다가 우리 강쥐가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아서 친구들 강쥐까지 사주느라 총 4개나 샀네요ㅋㅋ 엄청 마음에 들고 디자인 너무 귀엽고 완전 고퀄이에요ㅠㅠ!!!
reviews.content_en: I originally bought the set product, but my pup loved it so much that I ended up buying it for my friends' dogs too—I've bought 4 total now ㅋㅋ I'm so happy with it, the design is super cute, and the quality is amazing! ㅠㅠ!!!

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 기존 노즈워크 장난감이 해져서 구입을 했는데 댕댕이가 너무 잘가지고 놀아요! 귀엽게 생기기도 하고 바스락 거리는 부분을 제일 좋아하네요 앞에 인형에 삐삑이 소리도 나서 누르면 서리듣고 바로 달려오네요
reviews.content_en: My old nose work toy got worn out so I got this one, and my pup loves playing with it! It's adorable looking, and they especially love the crinkly parts. The plush has a squeaker too, so when they press it, they hear the sound and come running right over!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
이거 사길 정말 잘했어요
몇일동안 눈팅만 했는데 마침 할인까지 하길래 바로 샀거든요 ㅎㅎ
받자마자 곳곳에 간식숨겨주고 볼일 보고 왔는데
중간중간 cctv봐도 저거 갖고 놀고 있고 집에와서 애들에게 물어봐도 저것만 갖고놀더래요ㅋㅋㅋ 제가 와서도 진짜 오래 잘 가지고 놀더라구요~
사진과 영상은 제가 왔을때 찍은거에요  두시간가까이 갖고논 후이고 간식 다빼먹고 없는데도 저 쿠션위로 올라와서ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
정말 200프로 만족하고 뿌듯하고 
너무 좋습니다^^
reviews.content_en: I'm so glad I bought this! I was just browsing it for a few days and then there was a discount, so I bought it right away ㅎㅎ As soon as it arrived, I hid treats all over it and left to run errands. Even checking the CCTV, my dog was playing with it the whole time, and when I asked the kids at home, they said it was all my dog played with ㅋㅋㅋ When I came home, they really did play with it for a long time~ The photos and video are from when I got home, after playing with it for almost two hours. Even after eating all the treats and there's nothing left, they still hop up on top of the cushion ㅎㅎㅎㅎ I'm seriously 200% satisfied and so proud. It's wonderful! ^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
올해 8살 접어든 푸들 공주님 모시는 집사임당~^^
포켓토이 시리즈가 비싸던데 
"스카우트 노즈워크 플레이북"은 
할인 하길래 냉큼 구입 했어요!!!
포켓 토이가 내용이 알차게 되어 있더라구요!
표지에 장식된 푸들도 넘 귀여워요~
긍데...제가 받은건 푸들 얼굴에 입이 삐뚤어져 있고~
플레이북 안쪽에도 바느질이 삐뚤어져 있어 아쉽...
우선 같이 구입한 "마트스낵 포켓토이"로 놀고 있는데
넘 잘놀아서 스카우트 노즈워크 플레이북도 잘 갖고
놀거 같아요.
reviews.content_en: I'm a dog mom to a poodle princess who just turned 8 this year~^^ The POCKET TOY series is pricey, but I grabbed 'SCOUT NOSE WORK PLAYBOOK' since it was on sale!!! The pocket toy has really good content inside! The poodle design on the cover is adorable~ But... the one I got has the poodle's mouth a bit crooked~ and the stitching inside the playbook is also crooked, which is a shame... For now, my pup is playing with the 'MUTT SNACK POCKET TOY' that I bought together, and she loves it so much that I think she'll have a blast with the SCOUT NOSE WORK PLAYBOOK too.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
울 집 댕댕이 댕신남 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
노즈워크 잘 하는 댕댕이인데 지금 이거 딱 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
너무 어렵지도 않고 그렇다고 머리를 안 쓰는 것도 아닌..!
숨길수잇는공간이 넘 많아서 조아요 ㅠㅠ
요즘 1일 1노즈워크 중🧡✨
완전 대박 추천! 이거 질링 때 쯤에는 상급다 버전 사봐야겟어용 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup is such a handsome boy lol He's good at nose work, and this is perfect for him right now ㅎㅎ It's not too hard, but it's not boring either~! There are so many spots to hide treats in, I love it ㅠㅠ We're doing 1 nose work session a day these days 🧡✨ Seriously amazing recommendation! Once he gets bored with this, I'll have to get the advanced version lol

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content:
노즈워크북 간식놀이가 처음인 봄이에요
난이도가 어렵진 않을지 관심을 보이지 않으면 어떡하나 걱정하며 구매해봤어요 노즈워크용 간식으로는 ‘씽크라이크펫 비건 해피트릿 수제 야채과일 간식‘ 사용했어요

처음에는 머리로 밀다가 안보이니 그냥 저에게 왔었는데, 안에 간식 있다고 알려주고 손에 든 간식 넣는거 보여주고나니 앞발로 막 긁네요 여러장에 넣어주니 신기하게 다 꺼내먹어요ㅋㅋ 잘 안나오는건 책 그 자체를 어금니에 넣고 씹기도 했어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 매일 놀이시켜줘야겠어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: This nose work book is Bom's first time doing treat play~ I was worried the difficulty might be too hard or that he wouldn't be interested, so I decided to give it a try. I used 'THINK LIKE PET VEGAN HAPPY TREATS Homemade Veggie & Fruit Treats' for the nose work treats. At first he just pushed at it with his nose and came to me when he couldn't see anything, but after I showed him there were treats inside and demonstrated putting one in with my hand, he started scratching at it with his front paws lol When I put treats in multiple spots, he somehow managed to get them all out haha Sometimes with the ones that don't come out easily, he'd put the book itself in his mouth and chew lol I'll have to play with him like this every day ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 노즈워크북만 이번에 세번째💚
저희집 강아지가 항상 좋아해서 늘 만족하는 바잇미!
이번에는 새로나온 노즈워크 간식과 함께 구매해 봤는데
입맛 까다로운 봄이도 잘 먹는 간식!!❤️
노즈워크 용으로 ,훈련용으로 정말 찰떡..
오늘같은 비 오는 날에 정말 노즈워크북이 있어서 다행이요~
노즈워크북 시리즈로 계속 구매 할 예정입니다!! 😆😆
reviews.content_en: This is my third time buying the BITE ME Nose Work Book 💚 My dog always loves it, so I'm always satisfied with BITE ME! This time I bought it together with their new nose work treats, and even picky eater Bom eats the treats well!! ❤️ Perfect for nose work and training~ On rainy days like today, I'm so glad we have the nose work book~ I'm planning to keep buying from the BITE ME Nose Work Book series!! 😆😆

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
일단 열자마자 우리 애 닮은 초귀요미로 일차 심쿵 갈겼고 
자기 건지 어캐 알고 냉큼 와서 냄새 맡는 울 멈미 덕분에 또 이차 심쿵 갈겨졌네요 
너무너무 귀엽구 간식 쏙쏙 넣어주면 좋아할것같애용 
옆집 멍멍이 생일 선물로 이거 또 사줄라구용 ㅎ ㅎ
reviews.content_en: As soon as I opened it, I got heart-fluttered by how cute it looked - just like my pup 💕 and then my mom got heart-fluttered again when she came right over and started sniffing it, knowing it was hers lol It's so so cute, and I think she'll love it when I tuck treats inside~ I'm gonna buy this again as a birthday gift for the neighbor's puppy ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀아요 ㅋㅋㅋ 찍찍이로 난이도 조절도 할 수 있고 진짜 책 넘기듯이 넘기면서 가지고 노니까 귀엽고 오랫동안 노즈워크 할 수 있어서 좋은 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: She loves it and plays with it so much lol You can adjust the difficulty with velcro, and since she plays with it like she's flipping through a real book, it's cute and she can do nose work for a long time, so it's great!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
오자마자 개봉해서 간식 숨겨뒀는데ㅋㄱ
첨에 무서워서 멀찍이서 빼먹더니 과감하게 지금은 발로 잡고 먹어욬ㅋ 휴 이맛에 돈벌죠ㅜ 
너무 귀여워서 심장아파요!
다른 제품도 살테니 많이 개발해주세요><♥
바잇미 단골될래요!
reviews.content_en: Right when it arrived I opened it and hid treats inside lol At first he was scared and ate from a distance, but now he's boldly grabbing and eating with his paws lol Sigh, this is why we make money haha My heart aches, it's so cute! I'll buy other products too, please develop more ><♥ I'm gonna be a BITE ME regular!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
평소 양말이나 종이컵 노즈워크해줬는뎅 책 넘 기여워서 구매 
워낙 숨겨놓아도 금방 찾아먹어서 금방 끝날줄 알았는데
생각보다는 길게 잘 가쟈놀았어용
안에 내용도 귀엽고 퀄리티도 좋아용!!
reviews.content_en: We usually do nose work with socks or paper cups, but the book looked so cute I bought it. I thought he'd find and eat everything quickly since he usually finds hidden treats fast, but surprisingly he played with it for a long time~ The content inside is cute and the quality is great too!!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 일주일에 하나씩 격파 중이에요. 바잇미 멍멍북은 난이도를 조절할 수 있어서 아로가 가지고 노는데 한참 걸리네요. 푸들이라 분리불안 잇을거라고 주변에서 그러는데 멍멍북 하나면 제가 나가는 것도 몰라요!!! 나갈 때 만들어주고 나가면 1시간은 신나게 놀고, 그 후에도 계속 킁킁이해요. 이쁘기도 하고 구성도 재밌어서 잘샀템 입니다ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I'm tackling one nose work toy a week. The BITE ME Puppy Book is great because you can adjust the difficulty, so Aero spends a long time playing with it. People around me say poodles have separation anxiety, but with the puppy book, he doesn't even notice when I leave!!! I set it up when I leave and he plays happily for at least an hour, and even after that he keeps sniffing at it. It's pretty and fun to use, so it was a great purchase ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 너무 잘 가지고놀아요!! 엄청 어렵지않고 난이도 딱적당해서 좋습니당
reviews.content_en: She plays with it so much!! It's not too hard and the difficulty level is just right, so I love it!!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
우리 개가 바잇미 런드리 플레이북을 너무 좋아해서 만족만족 대만족이였는데 지인분이 스카우트 플레이북도 애들이 너무 좋아한다고 해서 믿고 구매해봤더니 역시나....👍🏻👍🏻
애가 벌써 공부하느라 정신 없네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ^^
뿌듯합니다 이럴려고 출근해요ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en:
Our pup absolutely loves the BITE ME Laundry Playbook so we were super duper satisfied, and since someone I know said their dogs love the Scout Playbook too, I trusted and bought it and wow...👍🏻👍🏻
The pup is already so busy studying lol 😂
I feel so proud - this is why I go to work ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 항상 사료를 급하게 먹고 분리불안이 있는 강아지라서 노즈워크 장난감을 이것저것 많이 사주는편이예요 왠만한 노즈워크 장난감은 금방 다 찾아서 먹어버리는데요 바잇미 멍멍 스카우트 노즈워크 플레이북은 사료나 간식을 찾아서 먹는데 오랫동안 찾아서 먹더라구요 엄청 크게 펼칠 수 있는 노즈워크 담요도 사봤는데 일단 보관할 때 자리차지를 너무 많이 하고 세탁을 할 때도 힘들고 건조시키려면 며칠 걸려서 힘들더라구요 그런데 이제품은 사이즈도 작아서 보관도 편리하고 어디 가지고 다니기에도 괜찮은 크기라고 생각해요 또 세탁할 때나 건조시에도 훨씬 쉽구요 페이지마다 다양하게 모앙이 디자인 되어 있어서 강아지가 지겨워하지 않고 매우 재밌고 흥미로워해요 특히 텐트 페이지는 코먹는소리(?)까지 내면서 엄청 잘 갖고 놀아요~ 한가지 아쉬운 점은 책의표지에 인형이 엄청 귀엽지만 강아지가 물어뜯으니 뽀글이털같은 부분이 잘 뜯겨나오네요
reviews.content_en: My dog always eats food quickly and has separation anxiety, so I buy a lot of different nose work toys. Usually my pup finds and finishes most nose work toys pretty fast, but with the BITE ME Meong Meong Scout Nose Work Playbook, it takes a long time to find and eat the treats. I also bought a really big unfoldable nose work blanket, but it takes up so much storage space, is hard to wash, and takes days to dry. This product is so much better because the size is compact - it's easy to store and a good size to take around. Plus it's much easier to wash and dry! Each page has different designs so my dog doesn't get bored and finds it really fun and interesting. Especially the tent page - my pup makes snuffling sounds and plays with it SO well~ The only downside is the cover has an adorable plush toy, but my dog chews it and pulls off the fuzzy parts.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
노란애가 2.7키로 하얀아이가 1.5키로입니다.
저번꺼보다 조금 더 어려워졌어요!
큰애가 한 20분컷? 잘 못뜯을땐 자다가 일어나서도 놀더라구요ㅎ
작은애는 애가 작다보니 30~40분컷이예요. 그래서 만족도가 엄청 높네요ㅎ
찍찍이 지도쪽 텐트쪽 조금 어려워했는데 , 처음에 눈앞에서 몇번 보여주고 시키니까 포인트를 딱 찾아서 잘가지고노네요ㅎㅎ
머리쓰게하기도 좋고, 어디갈때 딱 간편히 책만 챙기면 되고, 보관도 책하나라 엄청 간편해요!
저희애들 최애 노즈워크예요💛

아,, 대신 처음 두어번 가지고 놀땐 찍찍이얼굴로 미는게 많다보니 정리덜된 실? 같은게 눈에 들어가있더라근요.
처음에 하기전에 실안보여도 돌돌이로 싹 밀어서 정리몇번 해주면 좋아요!
reviews.content_en:
The yellow one is 2.7kg and the white one is 1.5kg.
It's a bit more difficult than the last one!
The big one lasts about 20 minutes? When she can't tear it open, she wakes up from naps to keep playing ㅎ
The little one only lasts about 30-40 minutes since she's smaller. So I'm very satisfied ㅎ
The velcro side and tent part were a little tricky at first, but after showing her a few times right in front of her eyes, she figured out exactly how to do it and plays well ㅎㅎ
It's great for making them use their brain, when we go out we just grab the book, and storage is so convenient since it's just one book!
It's my pups' favorite nose work toy 💛

Oh, by the way, the first couple times they played with it, they were pushing it with their velcro-side face so much that some loose threads got in their eyes. Before the first use, even if you don't see threads, rolling over it a few times to tidy it up is a good idea!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
일단 너무 귀여워요... 책으로 된 노즈워크라니!!
어려워 할 줄 알았는데 코 박고 미친듯이 킁킁 대며 잘 찾아내내요. 간식 다 먹고도 혼자 물어 뜯으며 잘 갖고 놀아요!!
reviews.content_en:
It's just so cute... a nose work book?!
I thought it would be hard for her, but she buries her nose and sniffs like crazy to find it well. Even after eating all the treats, she chews on it herself and plays with it so well!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 색감도 이쁘고 많이  바스락 거려서 댕댕이가 엄청 좋아하네요.간식 숨길 곳도 구석구석 많아서 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: The colors are pretty and it crinkles a lot so my pup absolutely loves it. There are lots of nooks and crannies to hide treats in, which is great.

reviews.name: n****
reviews.content:
우리애 하버드 보내려고 구매했어요
시즌 1은 고민했는데 이번 제품은 너무 귀여워서 바로 결제했어요
엥간한 노즈워크는 다 3분컷인데 이건 20분 정도 혼자 잘 갖고 놀아서 매우 만족합니다
다양한 시리즈로 나왔으면 좋겠어용 텍마머니~!~
이벤트성으로? 뭔가 노랑 스카프도 같이 있으면 더 보이 스카우트 느낌 나고 귀여울 듯 해용
다른 리뷰에 먼지타서 온다고 해서 걱정했는데 깨끗했고 내구성도 튼튼했어요
겁네 귀여우니깐 그냥 사세요~ 후회 없어용 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I bought this to send my pup to Harvard 😄
I was uncertain about Season 1, but this one was so cute I just checked out right away
Most nose work toys only last 3 minutes, but this one keeps my pup entertained alone for about 20 minutes so I'm very satisfied
I hope they come out with more varied series~ Texmaker! ~!~
I was worried because another review mentioned it arrived with dust, but it was clean and the durability is great
Since it's just too cute, just buy it~ No regrets hehe

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
환장하네요.. 절대 안뺏기려고 물고다닙니다ㅋㅋ
어려워서 그런지 하루만에 애착인형 됐어요..
찾는거 너무 귀여움
reviews.content_en:
I'm obsessed.. he refuses to let it go and carries it around ㅋㅋ
Maybe because it's hard, it became his comfort toy on day one..
It's so cute watching him search for it

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 음....개나댄다란 이런것인가를 보실 수있는 좋은기회입니다. 저번보다 난이도가 약간 업그레이드돼서 제 시간이 조금이나마 생겨서 너무 좋지만...거기까지인걸로..간식무한리필집 온줄 아는듯이 잘찾아먹어여;;사방팔방을 뛰어다니면서 읽고 먹는데 가만히 제자리에서 책을 못읽는 저를 닮아서 그런건지 뭐라할 처지는 못됩니다만.. ㅋㅋㅋ 우리집 열정만수르 두부 !!!평소 노즈워크 달인이라 그런지 새로운 노즈워크도 대만족입니다
reviews.content_en: Hmm....you can really see what they mean by "dogs are dogs"! The difficulty level is slightly upgraded from the last one so I actually get some free time, which is nice, but...that's about it.. He finds and eats treats like it's an all-you-can-eat buffet;; He runs around in all directions reading and eating, and since he can't sit still with a book like I can't sit still reading normally, I can't really complain ㅋㅋㅋ My Dubu, our passionate nose work expert!!! Since he's usually a nose work master, he's very satisfied with this new nose work toy too

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워크를 재밌어하고 좋아해서 이 시리즈 노즈워크 두번째 구매에용 처음에 막 탐색해보더니 노즈워크 시작하니까 킁킁 하면서 잘 찾아내더라구요! ㅎㅎㅎ 페이지마다 구성이 달라서 질리지 않고 잘 사용할 거 같아요~~!
reviews.content_en: Since my pup enjoys and likes nose work, this is my second purchase of this series~ At first he just explored it, then once I started the nose work he figured it out well with lots of sniffing! ㅎㅎㅎ Each page has different configurations so he won't get bored and I think he'll use it well~~!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요💛 처음에는 앞 면에 곰돌이 가지고 놀다가 물고 꾸벅꾸벅 졸고 ㅋㅋㅋ 사료 넣어줬는데 킁킁소리 엄청 나면서 열심히 코운동해요! 넣어주는 곳도 꽤 많고, 디자인이 독특하고 귀여워서 사람도 강쥐도 보는 재미도 있고, 아이디어 진짜 좋은 것 같아요! 갖고 있는 노즈워크 진짜 많은데 이거 꽤 오래 가지고 놀아요 시리즈 계속 나왔으면 좋겠어요 근데 처음에 냄새나서 세탁 필수입니다!
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much 💛 At first he just played with the bear on the front, then he bit it and kept dozing off ㅋㅋㅋ and when I put kibble in, he makes snuffling sounds and exercises his snout so hard! There are quite a lot of places to put treats, the design is unique and cute so both humans and puppers have fun looking at it, and I think the idea is really great! I have a lot of nose work toys, but he plays with this one for quite a while. I hope the series continues. But it has a smell at first so washing is a must!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
런치박스 노즈워크로 엄청 잘 놀아서 찢어지고 삘래 해도해도 까매서 새로 사줬어요!
택배상자 열자마자 난리난리 ㅋㅋ
냄새 맡고 빨리 간식 숨어서 달라고 하네요^^
런치박스랑 비교하면 숨긴곳이 많아진것 같고 바스락이 더 넓아진것 같고 소리도 커진것 같아요! 
런치박스엔 끈이 있었는데 스카우트엔 끈이 없어지고 매직테이프가 되어서 더 좋은것 같아요!
너무 귀여워요!
근데 안쪽이 꾸겨져있어서 아쉬웠어요 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: My pup played so hard with the Lunch Box nose work toy that it got torn and dirty, so I bought a new one! 😄 As soon as we opened the delivery box, she went absolutely crazy lol The moment she smelled it, she was asking me to hide treats in it right away^^ Compared to the Lunch Box, this one seems to have more hiding spots, the crinkly parts seem wider, and the sounds seem louder! The Lunch Box had a string, but the Scout doesn't have one anymore and has velcro instead, which is even better! It's so cute! But the inside was a bit wrinkled, which was a shame ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
노즈워킹이 처음인 강아지도 어렵지 않게 할 수 있어요!!
울애기는 특히 바시락 소리가 나는 지도 페이지랑  비스켓(?) 그림이 그려진 페이지를 좋아해요!! 간식을 숨겨줄때만 좋아하는게 아니라. 그냥 이 책을 하루종일 물고다니면서 가지고 댕겨요 . 질릴까봐 살짝 걱정이지만, 만약 질려한다면 이 책과 같은 시리즈 책을 더 사줄 생각이랍니다!!
제일 좋은 점은 토리만 두고 집을 나설때 혼자 심심하진 않을까, 잘 있을까 걱정이었는데 여기에 간식을 숨겨두고 나가면
나갈때 가족들을 쳐다도 보지 않는 웃픈 일이 생긴답니다.
진짜로 우리가 나가든 말든 쳐다도 안보고 자기 일에만 몰두해있는 모습이 살짝 서운하면서도 너무 기특해요!!
  마지막 사진은 이 책에서 가장 어려운 페이지일 듯한 
비스켓에 순겨둔 간식 찾아먹느라 무아지경인 토리!!♡ 
우리 매일매일 노즈워킹책 읽어서 똑똑해지자~~!!
reviews.content_en: Even puppies doing nose work for the first time can do it without difficulty!! My baby especially loves the crinkly map page and the page with the biscuit(?) drawing!! She doesn't just like it when I hide treats in it - she just carries this book around all day long lol I'm a bit worried she might get bored with it, but if she does, I'm planning to buy more books from the same series!! The best part is that I used to worry Tori would be lonely and upset when we left her alone at home, but now if I hide treats in here before we go out, she won't even look at us when we're leaving 😅 It's a bit sad but also so admirable to see her completely focused on her own thing, not even looking our way whether we leave or not!! The last photo is Tori in a complete zone, trying to find and eat the treats hidden in the biscuit pocket - probably the hardest page in this book!!♡ Let's read our nose work book every day and get smart together~~!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
완전 대만족입니다.
당연히 새장난감을 좋아하긴 하지만
이건 진짜 내부 구성이 좋네요.
처음 주고 1시간정도 혼자 물고 뜯고 던지고 파고
신나게 놀고 뻗었어요 ㅋㅋ
안에 천 뽑는게 좀 약해서 쉽게 끊어지긴 했지만
먹지만 않으면 크게 생관 없을거 같아요.

안쓸때는 넣어두었다가 놀때 꺼내주면 혼자 집중해서
엄청 잘 놀거 같아요 ㅋㅋ
진짜 무아지경 세계로 데려다 줄거에요. 강추!
reviews.content_en: I'm completely satisfied! Of course my pet likes cage toys in general, but this one has a really great internal design. When I first gave it to her, she chewed, bit, threw, and dug for about an hour and played excitedly then passed out lol 😄 The fabric inside pulls out a bit weakly and tears easily, but as long as she doesn't eat it, it shouldn't be a big problem. When not in use, I keep it stored and take it out during playtime - she'll focus and play really well on her own lol 😄 It'll really take her to a zone of pure concentration. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 무아지경입니다 진짜 저아해요~ 단점은 저거할ㄸㅐ 건드리면 주인을 뭅니다~
reviews.content_en: It's absolutely enthralling - I really love it~ The downside is that when you touch it while she's using it, she bites the owner~

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 해주는게 좋다고해서 며칠 검색후 구매했는데 우리집 멍뭉이가 너무 잘 갖고 놀아요! 주머니 작은 부분에 사료 숨길땐 어려워서 못찾지 않을까 걱정했는데 몇번 터득하고는 한참을 가지고 놀아요! 디자인도 캠핑느낌으로 귀엽고 정말 같이 캠핑가고싶은 장난감이네요!
reviews.content_en: I did some research for a few days after hearing that nose work is good for dogs, and then I bought this. My pup really loves playing with it! I was worried she wouldn't find the kibble hidden in the small pockets, but after figuring it out a few times, she plays with it for a long time! The design has a cute camping vibe, and it's a toy that really makes me want to go camping with her!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희집 강아지 지난번에 바잇미 노즈워크북을 사줬는데 너무 잘 가지고 놀길래 이번에는 멍멍스카우트 플래이북을 사줘봤는데 역시나 엄청 잘 가시고 노네요
reviews.content_en: We bought our pup the BITE ME nose work book last time and she played with it so well, so this time I got her the Pup Scout Playbook and she's been playing with it really great too!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
런치박스 플레이북 살까말까 계속 고민햇엇는데
요번에 스카우트 플레이북 새로 나와서 구매해봤는데
진작 사줄껄 그랬어요ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ으허엉
진짜 잘 가지고 놀아요
포장 뜯기도전부터 지껀지 알고와서 물어뜯고 난리네우
평소 노즈워크 좋아하는 아기들이라면 무조건 구매해야 할 제품이에요!!!
페이지가 많아서 애기가 질려하지 않구 오래 가지고 놀아용
reviews.content_en: I kept going back and forth on whether to buy the Lunch Box Playbook, but when the Scout Playbook came out new, I decided to try it and I wish I'd bought it sooner ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ *crying* She really loves playing with it! Even before I finished opening the packaging, she already knew what it was and started chewing and going crazy! If your pup loves nose work, you absolutely have to buy this product!!! There are so many pages that she doesn't get bored and plays with it for a long time~

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 저번에 샀던 플레이북 노즈워크가 최애 장난감이 되어버려서 다른 테마가 나오기를 간절히 간절히 바라고 있었는데 세상에 더 귀엽고 시끌시끌한 애가 나왔네요! 대문에 붙어있는 삑삑이 갱얼쥐인형도, 바스락 지도도 너무 좋아요..너무 좋은데 갖고노는 거 보고 싶은데 소유욕이 넘치는 애라서 숨어서 먹네요..암튼 요런 애정템 만들어주셔서 정말정말 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: The Playbook nose work I bought last time became my pup's favorite toy, so I was desperately hoping a different theme would come out, and now there's an even cuter and noisier one! I love the squeaky squeaker hamster toy attached to the front door and the crinkly map so much.. I love it so much but want to watch her play with it, but she's so possessive that she hides and eats it.. Anyway, thank you so much for making this kind of beloved toy!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
아이가 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요!
안에 바스락 소리때문에 더 집중해서 노즈워크에 집중하고 
간식이 안나오니까 막 찾으려고 애씁니다. 
어린 강아지인데, 사주길 정말 잘한거 같아요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves playing with it so much! The crinkly sound inside makes her focus more on the nose work, and since the treats don't come out easily, she really tries hard to find them. She's still a young puppy, and I'm so glad I got this for her!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
오자마자 오픈식하셔서 노즈워크하셨어요 앞발을 많이 사용하는 아이라 설명보고 구매했는데 좋네요
바잇미 대형견 작은 삑삑이 인형들 노즈워크 많이 다른곳에서 구매했는데 여기서 대형견 삑삑이있는거 보고 구매 했고 완전 바잇미 광팬 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: She did the nose work session right when we opened it! Since my pup uses her front paws a lot, I read the description and bought this - and it's great! I've bought a lot of BITE ME large dog squeaky toys nose work toys from other places, but when I saw they had large dog squeakies here, I bought it and I'm a total BITE ME fan now haha
